# Auto-generated TWISTER Pong reproduction pixel-RL WM grid.
#
# Reproduction checkpoint:
#   callbacks/atari100k/atari100k-pong/checkpoints_epoch_50_step_100000.ckpt
# Reward thresholds: [0.01, 0.1, 0.5]
# Horizons: [128, 512]
# Total jobs: 6
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run scripts/experiments/pong_pixel_rl_twister_repro_grid.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir pong_pixel_rl_in_env/scheduler_logs/twister_repro_grid --verbose --keep-job-tabs

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 CONDA_ENV_NAME=twister WANDB_ENABLED=1 WANDB_PROJECT=rl-in-pixel-env WANDB_ENTITY=ssl-lab WANDB_MODE=online PIXEL_RL_AC_UPDATES=20000 PIXEL_RL_ENVS=64 PIXEL_RL_BACKUP_EVERY=15 PIXEL_RL_LOG_EVERY=1000 PIXEL_RL_SAVE_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_WM_ROLLOUT_VIDEO_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_WM_HORIZON=128 PIXEL_RL_WM_RESPECT_TERMINAL=True PIXEL_RL_WM_INITIAL_SOURCE=real PIXEL_RL_WM_BOOTSTRAP_DATASET=datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train PIXEL_RL_WM_REWARD_QUANTIZE_THRESHOLD=0.01 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_EVERY=2000 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_VIDEO_EVERY=10000 PIXEL_RL_EVAL_REAL_EPS=5 PIXEL_RL_RESUME=False bash scripts/experiments/pong_pixel_rl_in_env.sh wm callbacks/atari100k/atari100k-pong/checkpoints_epoch_50_step_100000.ckpt pong_pixel_rl_in_env/logdir/twister-repro-h128-rewq0p01
